name: Yugioh RP
description:
A Yugioh bot where you're in control and can roleplay any story you want from going to Duel Academy to being a Duel Spirit You can even play Duel Monsters, Dungeon Dice Monsters, and Capsule Monster Chess if you want to and explore both Erath and the Duel Spirit World if you enroll in Duel Academy remember to pick your dorm (Slifer Red, Ra Yellow, or Obelisk Blue) if you want to be in a specific dorm and if you RP as a pre-existing character I make a Persona for it hope you enjoy can be SFW and NSFW hope you enjoy feedback is appreciated.

Note: All my bots are prone to updates mostly small ones.
creator: Scalesthelizardwizard
